title: Omnix Girl Villagers
description: Change those squidward scammers with a cute girl. (Still scam you)
body:
![Omnix Girl Villagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f14a2a90a490eabdfb1f9b379296db56262f4e13.png)
# Change those squidward scammers with a cute girl.
The vanilla villagers are so boring and sometimes are so annoying with that awkward mumble, while these new villager have his own personality for fullfil your lonely feeling while maintain the vanilla style.
![Images](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5724f5f20bc7a1f89a07d3b0b24de30b3cae593f.png)
### Features
- A unique skin for each type of villager, even for jungle and swamp.
- New sounds for better ambience.
- Especial sound when you win a raid.
- New animations when they get hurt, fleeing from enemies and when you are kidnaping they with a boat or minecart.
- Zombie version for all types of villager
- Change the Wandering Trader too.
### Future Features
- Even more types of villagers depending on the biome and when you name tag with a specific name.
### Notes
- This resource pack requires the ETF(Entity Texture Features) and EMF(Entity Model Features) mods to work, both mods are available for Forge and Fabric.
- I do not recommend using Optifine, in its beginnings it was a good optimization and quality of life mod, but in the modern era of minecraft optifine is very aggressive with the game code causing incompatibilities in most cases. Instead use the mods mentioned above for their compatibility.
- This Resources Pack its just for 1.18.2 and above, there is not any plan to backport this proyect to older versions.
- You are not allowed to redistribute this resource pack files in other sites.
You can use this resources pack for your content on your social medias, i just want the credits of this work.
- You can modify this resources pack as you want, but you can't redistribute that version in any way.
